subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and beseemeth the Best-Beloved, Who hath opened wide the gates of divine knowledge unto all the peoples of the world through the appearance of the Most Great Luminary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که ابواب عرفان را بظهور نیر اعظم بر اهل عالم باصبع
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation
